title: rubus herculis
intro: Rubus herculis, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus herculis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
